title: There is enough now
subtitle: A three-minute release-and-allow for the running-out loop.
excerpt: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the running-out loop. The loop that runs underneath the bills being paid, the cupboards being full, the lights being on. Use as a standalone reset, after a tapping round, or before a money decision the day has been carrying.
sourceNotes: Release / Allow structure: The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. Theme adapted from Day 2 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Release fear of running out". The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.

content.text: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the running-out loop. The loop that runs underneath the bills being paid, the cupboards being full, the lights being on. Use it on its own, after a tapping round, or before a money decision the day has been carrying.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the loop that says there is never enough. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the truth that there has always been enough and that there is enough now. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
If the Allow lands as a lie on a particular day, tap first.
covers the morning version of the loop. For a daytime reset across the wider day's money tightness,
I am safe and steady with money today

The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. The theme (the running-out loop and meeting it with the present-tense truth that there has always been enough) is adapted from Day 2 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.
